form.formComment: At the latest run held ground to the line 3rd of 9 at Clare 0-52 on April 4 over 1200m, 3 len behind Prince Kuro with 55.5kg at $4.40. The race before that crossed from a wide gate to settle just off the pace but gave ground when 5th of 11 at Oakbank 0-56 on March 18 over 1050m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Refreshing with 54kg at $19. Comes into this off a solid third over 1200m at Clare last time but further improvement is required if she is to be competitive.
